method_summary: MANGO is an Online Continual Learning framework that balances stability-plasticity through gradient-gating and meta-learned regularization, where gradient-gating scales parameter updates based on sensitivity and meta-learned regularization adapts stability coefficients.
key_innovation: The meta-adaptive approach that uses replay as both a training signal and forgetting evaluator, with gradient-gating and meta-learned regularization to balance stability-plasticity.
best_result: State-of-the-art results with consistent performance across replay sizes
title: MANGO: Meta-Adaptive Network Gradient Optimization for Online Continual Learning
